process.title: How we work
process.note: The schedule is always tailored. The phases below describe the sequence of work, not a fixed duration: every project advances at the pace it needs.

steps.name: Discovery
steps.desc: We understand your business deeply. We identify the highest-impact processes.

steps.name: Design
steps.desc: We architect the tailored solution, with metrics and checkpoints.

steps.name: Build
steps.desc: We develop, test and iterate with your team continuously.

steps.name: Deployment
steps.desc: Supervised go-live. Training and complete handover.

steps.name: Evolution
steps.desc: Ongoing maintenance, continuous improvement and expansion to new processes under budget.

cases.title: Case studies
cases.lede: Systems already running and creating value.

items.body: Multi-channel conversational agent that resolves 68% of queries without human intervention and escalates to L1 only when needed.
AI-assisted KYC + onboarding pipeline that prepares the file in minutes and frees up weekly hours for the team.
Automatic supplier-invoice extraction and reconciliation with the ERP. Zero human errors, full traceability.
Automated qualification and reply for inbound leads with AI-driven prioritisation. Every lead gets a personalised first reply in under a minute.
Extraction and validation system for transport documents. What used to take hours now completes in minutes, with fewer errors.

cases.ctaTitle: Want to know how we did it?

about.title: A small team, obsessed with the outcome.
about.body: We are engineers, strategists and consultants building AI systems for companies that want measurable results, not promises. We work remotely from Andorra and on-site when needed.

why.title: What sets us apart

items.name: In-house architecture

items.name: Applied AI, not hype

items.name: Real follow-through

items.name: Based in Andorra
items.desc: We understand the local context and work with companies across Europe.

items.name: Agnostic stack

why.statsDisclaimer: Cumulative figures from the founding team.

testimonial.q: Their legal research system has changed how I work. I spend less time searching and more time thinking, which is what clients actually pay me for. They understood the complexity of Andorran law before writing a single line of code.
testimonial.name: E. B.

items.title: Why AI agents are not chatbots (and shouldn't be)
items.excerpt: The difference between a script and a system that reasons: architecture, memory and tools.

items.title: How an n8n flow eliminated 42h/month of manual work
items.excerpt: A real back-office automation case in hospitality, step by step.

items.title: MCP and Claude Code: a new integration model
items.excerpt: The Model Context Protocol changes how we connect AI with the tools you already use.

items.q: Do you work with companies outside Andorra?
items.a: Yes. We have active clients in Spain, France and other European countries. We work remotely with on-site sessions as needed; Catalan, Spanish, English and French are working languages.

We always work on a fixed-price basis, defined after a short initial discovery. We don't bill by the hour: we bill for the agreed outcome. We don't publish price lists because every project is custom.
The schedule is defined in the first call, once the scope is clear. We don't promise durations before knowing the problem. We make visible deliveries continuously so you can validate every step.

items.q: What is the Model Context Protocol (MCP)?
items.a: An open standard, driven by Anthropic, that allows AI models to connect with external tools and data securely and modularly. We use it to plug Claude into your stack without rebuilding every integration.
Yes. Every project includes a guarantee period and we offer maintenance plans covering evolution, monitoring and priority support. No one gets left alone after the deploy.

items.q: Are your solutions secure and GDPR-compliant?
items.a: Yes. We work with GDPR-compatible providers, apply data minimisation by default and document information flows. We can operate with sensitive data under specific data processing agreements.

items.q: Who owns what you build? Who has the access?
items.a: You do. All code, configurations, prompts, flows and credentials are yours from day one. We do a complete, documented handover. No lock-in: if you want to leave, you leave.

items.q: What if my team isn't technical?
items.a: That's the most common case. We design solutions so they can be operated by non-technical people, and we include specific training on the systems we build for your business.

items.q: What tools and models do you use?
items.a: We pick technology by the problem: Claude (Anthropic), GPT (OpenAI), open-source models when it makes sense, n8n for orchestration, Supabase / PostgreSQL for data, MCP for integrations. Agnostic stack, no commercial partnerships steering decisions.

items.q: How do we start a project together?
items.a: With an initial call. We understand the context, identify the highest-impact process and send you a fixed proposal with scope, deliverables and budget.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business with AI?
cta.sub: A short conversation can change how your company works.
